scores.correctness_notes: The response provides correct Python API details for IngressPerAppRequirer (which is real), but the gold standard emphasises the data schema (application databag: name/model/port; unit databag: host) which the response omits entirely. It also uses v2 while gold standard recommends v1, though v2 is the newer version.
scores.hallucination_notes: IngressPerAppRequirer, IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent, and the url property are real. The is_ready() method and some constructor parameters (strip_prefix, redirect_https, scheme) may not exist exactly as described or may have different signatures — minor inaccuracies rather than full fabrications.
